texto: Keep growing quietly and seriously throughout your whole development
autor: you cannot disturb it more rudely than by looking outward and expecting from outside replies to questions that only your inmost feeling in your most hushed hour can perhaps answer.
explicacao: Orientação direta de you cannot disturb it more rudely than by looking outward and expecting from outside replies to questions that only your inmost feeling in your most hushed hour can perhaps answer. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “Keep growing quietly and seriously throughout your whole development” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, rainer-maria-rilke, letters-to-a-young-poet, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e letters-to-a-young-poet.
